headline: Exploring the top movers within the S&P500 index during today's session.
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Tuesday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Pulte Calls Out Credit Reporting Firms. FICO’s Stock Is Tanking.
summary: Bill Pulte, director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, said credit score pricing and credit bureau pricing should be more affordable.

raw.headline: Pulte Calls Out Credit Reporting Firms. FICO’s Stock Is Tanking.
raw.summary: Bill Pulte, director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, said credit score pricing and credit bureau pricing should be more affordable.

headline: Senator Josh Hawley Targets FICO's Mortgage Credit Score Pricing In New Probe— 'Most Damaging...'
summary: Sen. Josh Hawley launched a probe into Fair Isaac Corp over the company's pricing of credit scoring in the mortgage market.

raw.headline: Senator Josh Hawley Targets FICO's Mortgage Credit Score Pricing In New Probe— 'Most Damaging...'
raw.summary: Sen. Josh Hawley launched a probe into Fair Isaac Corp over the company's pricing of credit scoring in the mortgage market.
